summary: Completed comprehensive testing of iteration 6 features: ErrorBoundary, 24h sessions, Audit Log system, and retry mechanism. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/audit-logs returns 200 with correct structure (logs array + total count)
Backend: Audit log entries have all required fields (id, user, action, entity_type, entity_name, details, created_at)
Backend: Creating a job via POST /api/jobs creates audit log entry with user='Plan', action='create'
Backend: Starting a job via PUT /api/jobs/{id}/start creates audit log entry with action='start'
Backend: Operator login (ali/134679) returns 200
Backend: Plan login (emrecan/testtest12) returns 200
Backend: Warehouse login (depo1/depo123) returns 200
Backend: Invalid login returns 401/404 error
Backend: Health endpoint returns healthy status
Frontend: ErrorBoundary component exists with recovery UI (Sayfayi Yenile button)
Frontend: All routes wrapped in ErrorBoundary in App.js
Frontend: Management login with 'buse11993' - SUCCESS
Frontend: Management Loglar tab shows audit logs table with headers (Tarih, Kullanici, Islem, Tur, Ad, Detay)
Frontend: Audit logs table displays 12 entries with correct action badges (Ekledi, Sildi, Baslatti)
Frontend: Operator login with ali/134679 - SUCCESS with 24h session (login_time stored)
Frontend: Plan login with emrecan/testtest12 - SUCCESS with 24h session (login_time stored)
Frontend: Warehouse login with depo1/depo123 - SUCCESS with 24h session (login_time stored)
Frontend: Retry mechanism implemented in ManagementFlow.fetchData (3 retries with exponential backoff)
Frontend: Retry mechanism implemented in OperatorFlow.fetchJobs (3 retries with exponential backoff)
Frontend: Retry mechanism implemented in PlanFlow.fetchMachines and fetchJobs (3 retries with exponential backoff)
seed_data_creation: Test jobs created during backend testing (TEST_AuditJob_*, TEST_StartJob_*) were cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 6 features verified: 1) ErrorBoundary wraps all routes in App.js and shows Turkish recovery UI on crash, 2) 24h sessions work for all panels (Operator, Plan, Warehouse) with login_time stored in localStorage, 3) Audit log system fully functional - backend stores logs for create/update/delete/start/complete/pause/resume actions, frontend Loglar tab in Management shows table with proper formatting, 4) Retry mechanism (3 retries with exponential backoff) implemented in all fetchData functions.

error_boundary.wrapping: All routes in App.js wrapped with ErrorBoundary
error_boundary.recovery_ui: Shows 'Bir hata olustu' message with 'Sayfayi Yenile' button

24h_sessions.warehouse: login_time stored in depo_session localStorage with 24h check

audit_logs.backend_model: AuditLog with id, user, action, entity_type, entity_name, details, created_at
audit_logs.backend_endpoint: GET /api/audit-logs returns logs array and total count
audit_logs.log_audit_helper: Called on create/update/delete/start/complete/pause/resume job + shift start + user creation + pallet creation
audit_logs.frontend_tab: Loglar tab in ManagementFlow shows table with Tarih, Kullanici, Islem, Tur, Ad, Detay columns

retry_mechanism.operator: fetchJobs retries 3 times with exponential backoff
retry_mechanism.plan: fetchMachines and fetchJobs retry 3 times with exponential backoff
